description_long: This is a round wall clock with a metallic silver frame and a smooth, slightly beveled edge. The clock face is white with black Arabic numerals marking each hour, and thin black tick marks for the minutes. Three black hands indicate the time, with the hour, minute, and second hands all clearly visible. The back of the clock features a small, black battery compartment with a red indicator, typical for battery-operated wall clocks. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, with no additional decorations or embellishments. The clock is likely constructed from lightweight metal or plastic, making it suitable for mounting on vertical surfaces in urban environments.
description: A round, silver-framed wall clock with a white face, black Arabic numerals, and three black hands. The design is minimalistic and functional, with a visible battery compartment on the back.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the back of the clock, highlighting the battery compartment and the smooth, metallic frame.
description_view_1: Side profile view displaying the clock's thin, slightly beveled edge and the shallow depth of the frame.
description_view_2: Front view revealing the white clock face, black Arabic numerals, and three black hands, all encased in a metallic frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile view, similar to view 1, showing the clock's slim profile and rounded edge.
attribute_face_design: Circular white face with black Arabic numerals, minute tick marks, and three black hands; no additional decorations.
